name: neoxp-haibao
description: Desktop workflow and analysis engine migration for macrophage phagocytosis analysis.

scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace=@neoxp/contracts && npm run build --workspace=@neoxp/parser && npm run build --workspace=@neoxp/workflow
scripts.typecheck:packages: npm run typecheck --workspace=@neoxp/contracts && npm run typecheck --workspace=@neoxp/parser && npm run typecheck --workspace=@neoxp/workflow
scripts.dev: npm run build:packages && npm run dev --workspace=@neoxp/desktop
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:packages && npm run typecheck --workspace=@neoxp/desktop
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build --workspace=@neoxp/desktop
